_meta.methodology: Monthly A&E Attendances and Emergency Admissions. Four-hour standard measured as percentage of all A&E attendances where time from arrival to admission, transfer or discharge was under four hours.

ae_4hr_target.label: A&E seen within 4 hours
ae_4hr_target.note: Target has not been met since July 2015

elective_waiting_list.label: Patients on elective waiting list
elective_waiting_list.note: Record high. Includes all patients waiting for consultant-led elective care.

waiting_over_18_weeks.label: Waiting over 18 weeks
waiting_over_18_weeks.note: The NHS Constitution gives patients a legal right to start treatment within 18 weeks.

nhs_vacancy_rate.label: NHS vacancy rate
nhs_vacancy_rate.note: Approximately 112,000 full-time equivalent vacancies across NHS trusts in England.
